name: Apple Pancakes (or Waffles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together all dry ingredients.
2. Mix eggs, buttermilk, and oil; add to dry ingredients and mix gently.
3. Fold in grated apple.
4. Cook on a lightly oiled griddle.
5. For waffles, double the ingredients and freeze any leftover waffles. Reheat on low setting in a toaster.
